blocks.body: Would rather pokazuje preferencję: co wolimy zrobić sami albo co wolelibyśmy, żeby zrobił ktoś inny.

{"level":"B1-B2","intro":"Would rather pomaga powiedzieć, że wolimy jeden wariant od drugiego. Ta konstrukcja działa zarówno dla naszej własnej czynności, jak i dla sytuacji, gdy chcemy, by ktoś inny zachował się inaczej.","rules":[{"label":"MOJA PREFERENCJA","color":"emerald","text":"Dla własnej czynności użyj would rather + base verb.","example":"I'd rather stay home tonight."},{"label":"FORMA PRZECZĄCA","color":"blue","text":"Dla przeczenia użyj would rather not + base verb.","example":"I'd rather not talk about it now."},{"label":"INNA OSOBA","color":"amber","text":"Gdy chcesz, żeby coś zrobił ktoś inny, użyj would rather + someone + past simple.","example":"I'd rather you came earlier tomorrow."}]}

{"title":"1. Forma","intro":"Najbardziej przydatne są takie wzory:","items":[{"label":"Własna czynność","title":"would rather + base verb","subtitle":"I'd rather take the train."},{"label":"Forma przecząca","title":"would rather not + base verb","subtitle":"We'd rather not wait outside."},{"label":"Inna osoba","title":"would rather + someone + past simple","subtitle":"I'd rather he stayed here."},{"label":"Pytanie","title":"Would you rather ...?","subtitle":"Would you rather go now or later?"}]}

{"title":"2. Główne zastosowania","sections":[{"label":"Osobista preferencja","color":"emerald","description":"Porównujemy dwie opcje i pokazujemy, którą wolimy.","examples":[{"en":"I'd rather walk than wait for the bus.","ua":"Wolałbym pójść pieszo niż czekać na autobus."},{"en":"She'd rather study at home tonight.","ua":"Ona wolałaby dziś uczyć się w domu."}]},{"label":"Would rather someone did","color":"blue","description":"Ten wzór łagodnie pokazuje, jakiej czynności oczekujemy od innej osoby.","examples":[{"en":"I'd rather you didn't mention this to Alex.","ua":"Wolałbym, żebyś nie wspominał o tym Alexowi."},{"en":"We'd rather the children stayed inside.","ua":"Wolelibyśmy, żeby dzieci zostały w środku."}]},{"label":"Pytania o wybór","color":"amber","description":"Would you rather...? to uprzejmy sposób zaproponowania wyboru.","examples":[{"en":"Would you rather sit by the window?","ua":"Wolałbyś usiąść przy oknie?"},{"en":"Would you rather meet on Friday or Saturday?","ua":"Wolisz spotkać się w piątek czy w sobotę?"}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie to po would rather.","wrong":"I'd rather to stay home.","right":"I'd rather stay home.","hint":"Po would rather używamy formy podstawowej bez to."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie present simple po someone.","wrong":"I'd rather you come tomorrow.","right":"I'd rather you came tomorrow.","hint":"Po would rather + someone zwykle używamy past simple."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Pomijanie would w zwykłych zdaniach o preferencji.","wrong":"I rather stay home today.","right":"I'd rather stay home today.","hint":"W naturalnym angielskim to znaczenie zwykle wymaga would rather."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótka reguła","items":["Would rather + base verb = moja preferencja.","Would rather not + base verb = wariant, którego nie chcę.","Would rather + someone + past simple = działanie, którego chcę od innej osoby.","Po would rather nie używamy to."]}

{"title":"Strony w tym dziale","items":[{"label":"Zero Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/zero-conditional","current":false},{"label":"First Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/first-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Second Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/second-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Third Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/third-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Mixed Conditionals","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/mixed-conditionals","current":false},{"label":"Unless / Provided / As long as","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/unless-provided-as-long-as","current":false},{"label":"In case","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/in-case","current":false},{"label":"Wish / If only","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/wish-if-only","current":false},{"label":"Would rather","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/would-rather","current":true},{"label":"Had better","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/had-better","current":false}]}
